name: Blue
lineage: Elven royal magic knight mother × dwarven hero blacksmith father
description: Protagonist of Blue's Myth. A talented young blacksmith and adventurer born to an elven royal magic knight and a dwarven hero smith.

name: Rurik Ironleaf
lineage: Dwarven hero blacksmith from the old demi-human armies
description: Blue's father, a dwarven hero and master blacksmith who lost an arm in the war and stayed behind to raise his children.

name: Elaria Moonblade
lineage: Elven royal magic knight of the old kingdom
description: Blue's mother, an elven royal magic knight who sacrificed herself by oath to save Rurik and is now held by the Elf King.

name: Lyriel
lineage: Fragment of the planet's sacrificial fairy race linked to the crystal shell
description: A light-blue fairy who descended in a crystal to save Blue, forming a contract to be taken to the Guardian of the Tree of Life in nine years.

name: Mira
description: Blue's childhood friend from the village, the girl he protects during the first dungeon overflow incident.

name: Lina
description: Blue's little sister, one of the reasons his father chooses to stay in the village instead of going to rescue Elaria.

name: Luna Starweaver
lineage: Descendant of an ancient arcane bloodline
description: A young magician who joined Blue's party, specializing in protective and utility magic.
